Game.Name: Super Solitaire (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It) (Proto)
Game.plot: Overview:Super Solitaire (JP: Trump Island) is a compilation of virtual card games intended for a single-player. As well as Solitaire and its variations, the game features a number of other solo card games.Super Solitaire was developed by Beam Software and published in the US by Extreme Entertainment Group in early 1994. The Japanese version, which was released in 1995, was published by Pack-In-Video.Games FeaturedKlondikeFree CellGolfCruelPyramidStonewallDozen't MatterAces UpFlorentinePokerCanfieldScorpion
Game.Notes: The classic card game of strategy and planning comes to your Super NES with 12 different Solitaire games in one Game Pak, including Klondike, Pyramid, Aces Up, Scorpion, Golf, even a poker variation. Conquer them all in the most challenging brain game you'll ever deal up.
